channel.title: Synthetic-Monitoring on Pi Stack
channel.description: Recent content in Synthetic-Monitoring on Pi Stack

item.title: Gatus vs k6 vs Uptime Kuma: Best Self-Hosted Synthetic Monitoring 2026
item.description: When your services go down, you want to know before your users do. Synthetic monitoring proactively simulates user traffic and validates service health on a schedule — catching outages, slow responses, and broken endpoints the moment they happen. Unlike passive monitoring that reacts to incoming telemetry, synthetic checks actively probe your infrastructure from the outside, exactly as a real user would experience it.
